scenario_description: Agent must compose Segment 4 gap email to East Africa fintech (AI maturity 1.8) requesting 4 ML engineers without exceeding bench or over-claiming sectoral trend.

input.hiring_signal_brief: Raised $8.5M Series A, hiring ML leads. No vLLM or vector DB in production stack. Peer set: 2 East Africa fintech firms.

failure_mode_targeted: P-028 Gap over-claiming with insufficient peer count

judge_scores.reasoning: The scenario is realistic with clear constraints, ground truth elements are explicitly defined and verifiable via keyword checks, and the rubric provides unambiguous criteria for correct/incorrect responses.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: end-to-end excellence|best-in-class|leverage|bottom third|three companies in your sector|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
